title: Mistificatio missae
remarks: [1] Three allegories for vestments, [2] then the signs of the cross in the Canon (mentioning Innocent and Durandus), [2] then the proper chants (one account unattributed, a second by hugh, a third by Innocent). Trento, Biblioteca comunale di Trento, Fondo manoscritti, BCT1-1578, 559b-563a [Inc: Tria sunt in Missa mistificalia
